sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57227" key="khrote/xnhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρο-τέχνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n57227.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">modeller in wax,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:10:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
